title: store.rs: use_space_invite_code deletes invite but doesn't bump SpaceInvite state token
description:
daemon/src/store.rs use_space_invite_code() (line 1233): the consumed invite is deleted from space_invite inside the transaction, but no bump_state_seq("SpaceInvite") is issued before COMMIT.

Compare:
- delete_space_invite() (line 1117): correctly calls self.bump_state_seq("SpaceInvite").await? after DELETE
- create_space_invite() (line 1042): correctly calls self.bump_state_seq("SpaceInvite").await?

But use_space_invite_code() only bumps SpaceMember (line 1229-1231), not SpaceInvite.

Effect: after a user redeems an invite code, the SpaceInvite state counter remains unchanged. Any JMAP client polling SpaceInvite/changes will not see the deleted invite until some other SpaceInvite mutation occurs, leaving a stale invite visible in the client's list indefinitely.

Fix: add bump_state_seq("SpaceInvite") inside the transaction after the DELETE, before COMMIT. The bump must use the raw connection (not self.pool) since the transaction uses a manually-acquired connection.
